sourceAmbiguity: Challenge grants can eventually reveal safe context but must not do so before success.
decisionTaken: Challenge landing and challenge step render no CapturedSoFarPanel and expose only generic challenge copy.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The shared contract forbids pre-existing patient data before challenge success.
operationalRisk: Adding analytics copy could accidentally include request context.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Keep validator checks for zero-detail challenge branches.
